name: Spit-Roasted Suckling Pig with Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the pig with lime juice, salt, pepper, and chopped herbs.
2. Place a spit through the pig and secure it to the spit using some wire to prevent slipping.
3. Skewer each end of the pig before inserting into the spit.
4. Roast the pig slowly, gradually browning the skin. If blistering occurs, reduce the heat.
5. While roasting, baste the pig with olive oil flavored with marjoram and thyme.
6. Cook for approximately 6 hours, then remove the pig from the spit and let it rest for 15 minutes before carving.
7. Place carved meat on a serving plate.
8. Grill eggplant until tender; grill peppers when they are tender, and seed and slice them.
9. Blanch zucchini, squash, and green beans in salted water.
10. Toss vegetables with olive oil, chopped herbs, salt, and pepper.
11. Add the prepared vegetables to the serving plate and garnish with halved garlic cloves from the skewers.
